recommendation_title: Design and standardize Strategy and Growth Planning
recommendation_text: Redesign strategy and growth planning as a controlled operating process. Define the scope, trigger points, required inputs, roles, decision rights, system touchpoints, handoff rules, and evidence standards so that strategic priorities are translated into funded initiatives, owners, milestones, and review routines rather than depending on informal practice.
why_this_matters: This matters because weak control over strategy and growth planning directly increases the risk of revenue plan attainment risk and reduces management confidence in performance.

advisory_note: Look for documented standards, ownership, decision rights, entry/exit criteria, required systems, and handoff rules for strategy and growth planning.

Define the scope, trigger points, required inputs, roles, decision rights, system touchpoints, handoff rules, and evidence standards so that customer health, risks, and opportunities are actively managed throughout the lifecycle rather than depending on informal practice.
why_this_matters: This matters because weak control over success management directly increases the risk of revenue churn leakage and reduces management confidence in performance.
expected_outcome: A documented and owned standard for success management that teams can follow consistently.
advisory_note: Look for documented standards, ownership, decision rights, entry/exit criteria, required systems, and handoff rules for success management.

recommendation_title: Stabilize execution of Success Management
recommendation_text: Stabilize day-to-day execution of success management by removing avoidable manual failure points, clarifying turnaround and quality standards, and coaching teams on consistent adoption so the workflow can operate with less delay, rework, and commercial risk.
why_this_matters: This matters because weak control over success management directly increases the risk of revenue churn leakage and reduces management confidence in performance.
expected_outcome: More predictable execution of success management with lower delay, less rework, and cleaner downstream handoffs.
advisory_note: Look for evidence of real operating discipline in success management, including turnaround, quality, rework, SLA adherence, and exception handling.

recommendation_title: Introduce KPI control for Success Management
recommendation_text: Establish a management-control layer for success management with clear KPI definitions, trusted data, thresholds, exception ownership, and structured review so issues can be identified early and corrected before they materially affect revenue churn leakage.
why_this_matters: This matters because weak control over success management directly increases the risk of revenue churn leakage and reduces management confidence in performance.
expected_outcome: Earlier visibility into issues within success management and faster corrective action through KPI-based management.
advisory_note: Look for trusted KPI visibility over success management, including metric definitions, review cadence, escalation, and closure of corrective actions.
